mrcommons 1.67.3
  • Reference

calcFeedPast

Source: R/calcFeedPast.R
calcFeedPast.Rd

Combines feed baskets of the past with livestock production to get total feed demand

Usage

calcFeedPast(
  balanceflow = TRUE,
  cellular = FALSE,
  cells = "lpjcell",
  products = "kall",
  nutrients = "all",
  yearly = FALSE
)

Arguments

balanceflow

if TRUE, a feed balance flow is included in total feed demand, if not it is excluded.

cellular

if TRUE value is calculated on cellular level with returned data just in dry matter

cells

Switch between "magpiecell" (59199) and "lpjcell" (67420)

products

products in feed baskets that shall be reported

nutrients

nutrients like dry matter (DM), reactive nitrogen (Nr), Phosphorus (P), Generalizable Energy (GE) and wet matter (WM).

yearly

whether to calculate yearly data or only magpie 5year timesteps

Value

List of magpie objects with results on country or cellular level, unit and description.

Author

Isabelle Weindl, Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, Kristine Karstens

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
calcOutput("FeedPast")
} # }

On this page

Developed by Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, Kristine Karstens, Lavinia Baumstark, Isabelle Weindl, Xiaoxi Wang, Abhijeet Mishra, Stephen Wirth, Mishko Stevanovic, Nele Steinmetz, Ulrich Kreidenweis, Renato Rodrigues, Roman Popov, Florian Humpenoeder, Anastasis Giannousakis, Antoine Levesque, David Klein, Ewerton Araujo, Eva Bleidorn, Felicitas Beier, Julian Oeser, Michaja Pehl, Debbora Leip, Michael Crawford, Edna Molina Bacca, Patrick von Jeetze, Eleonora Martinelli, Felix Schreyer, Bjoern Soergel, Pascal Sauer, David Hötten, Robin Hasse, Gabriel Abrahão, Pascal Weigmann, Jan Philipp Dietrich.
